implementationSummary: Reopened #303 (ADR-021): added action_cards table + migration 014, ActionCardsRepo with ShopScopedRepo upsert on workflow_key, persist_scoring_result mapping DailyScoringResult → rows, Celery refresh_action_cards task, POST/GET /v1/action-cards routes. Optional Fujiwa poll when TIKTOK_APP_* configured. Scoring pipeline unchanged.
assumptions: Poll skipped in tests and dev when TIKTOK_APP_KEY/SECRET absent.
Active status filter is sufficient for non-expired cards until expiry semantics land.
approved_at/executed_at/outcome columns reserved for P2-B4/B5 lifecycle wiring.
risks: Production poll requires Fujiwa credentials; refresh without poll uses stale aggregates only.
SQLite updated_at may not auto-bump on upsert in all drivers — Postgres onupdate handles production.
